【！召集英語旁聽師！】

英語審訊法庭要人！
越嚟越多社運案件進入審訊程序，
現有旁聽師可能要跑幾場，
面對英語審訊或者會感到無能為力，
如果自問英語能力唔錯，
但係又未搵到崗位嘅你，
怕羞唔知點踏出第一步嘅妳，
唔好左度右度，立即行動！
面對困難，請各位迎難而上！
等你！

We want YOU to sit in on English trials!
As more antiELAB cases are entering trial proceedings, many sit in experts(旁聽師) sit in on several courts every day and find themselves incapable of understanding English trials.
If you’re looking for a way to contribute, and you happen to be fluent in English, your time has come!

Don’t be shy and hesitant! Take the initiative to become an expert of sitting in on English trials.

Join us!
·
聯絡天水連線：@tswcbot

Source : https://t.me/HK_Schedule
